3213890.name: Top Alert
3213890.description:
Try your hand at storm chasing in this thrilling atmospheric game, where nature's power is on full display. Explore a vast, randomly generated open world as you monitor changing weather conditions and predict the approach of tornadoes. Full environmental destructibility adds realism and challenge—every house, tree, and car can be destroyed by powerful winds. Gather data and capture epic tornado photos while teaming up with friends in cooperative gameplay for up to 4 players. Can you be in the right place at the right time to take the best shot and survive the storm?

  • Fully destructible environment
  • Exploration and weather observation
  • Randomly generated world
  • Cooperative gameplay for up to 4 players
3213890.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
